title: Anthropic Accuses Alibaba of Large-Scale AI Theft
subtitle: The US tech firm claims its rival used millions of fake accounts to copy advanced artificial intelligence capabilities.

summary.en: US-based AI company Anthropic has accused Chinese firm Alibaba of stealing technology from its Claude model. Anthropic claims Alibaba used thousands of fake accounts to perform millions of exchanges to train its own AI. This process, known as a distillation attack, allows companies to copy expensive technology at a low cost. Anthropic has asked the US Congress to take action against such practices. Alibaba has not yet commented on these specific accusations.
summary.zh: 總部位於美國的人工智慧公司 Anthropic 指控中國企業阿里巴巴竊取其 Claude 模型的技術。Anthropic 聲稱阿里巴巴利用數千個假帳號進行數百萬次交流，藉此訓練自家的人工智慧。這種稱為「蒸餾攻擊」的過程，讓企業能以低成本複製昂貴的技術。Anthropic 已要求美國國會針對此類行為採取行動。阿里巴巴尚未對這些具體指控發表評論。

paragraphs.en: A major conflict has emerged in the world of artificial intelligence. Anthropic, a leading US-based AI company, has accused the Chinese technology giant Alibaba of stealing its AI technology. In a letter sent to US Senators Tim Scott and Elizabeth Warren, Anthropic described what it called the largest campaign of its kind to copy the capabilities of its AI model, Claude.
paragraphs.zh: 人工智慧領域爆發了一場重大衝突。總部位於美國的領先人工智慧公司 Anthropic 指控中國科技巨頭阿里巴巴竊取其人工智慧技術。在致美國參議員史考特 (Tim Scott) 與華倫 (Elizabeth Warren) 的信函中，Anthropic 形容這是有史以來規模最大、旨在複製其人工智慧模型 Claude 功能的行動。

paragraphs.en: According to BBC News, the company claims that operators linked to Alibaba used thousands of fraudulent accounts to interact with Claude nearly 29 million times. Ars Technica reports that these interactions took place between April 22 and June 5. Anthropic stated that the goal of this activity was to perform a "distillation attack." This is a process where a weaker AI model is trained by asking a stronger model, like Claude, to provide answers and reasoning. By doing this, a company can copy the advanced skills of a top-tier model without spending the huge amounts of money required for original research and development.
paragraphs.zh: 根據英國廣播公司新聞網 (BBC News) 報導，該公司聲稱與阿里巴巴有關聯的營運商利用數千個詐騙帳號，與 Claude 進行了近 2,900 萬次的互動。科技媒體 Ars Technica 報導指出，這些互動發生在 4 月 22 日至 6 月 5 日之間。Anthropic 表示，此類活動的目的是進行「蒸餾攻擊」。這是一種透過要求較強大的模型（如 Claude）提供答案與推理過程，進而訓練較弱人工智慧模型的手段。透過這種方式，企業無需投入原創研發所需的巨額資金，即可複製頂尖模型的先進技能。

paragraphs.en: Anthropic noted that the attackers targeted some of Claude’s most valuable features. These include the model's ability to solve complex software engineering problems and its skill in handling long-term tasks. The company argued that these attacks are happening on an "industrial scale." By using these methods, Anthropic claims that Chinese firms are turning billions of dollars of American investment into a free resource for their own geopolitical competitors.
paragraphs.zh: Anthropic 指出，攻擊者鎖定了 Claude 最具價值的幾項功能，包括該模型解決複雜軟體工程問題的能力，以及處理長期任務的技巧。該公司主張這些攻擊正以「工業規模」進行。Anthropic 聲稱，透過這些手段，中國企業正將數十億美元的美國投資轉化為自身地緣政治競爭對手的免費資源。

paragraphs.en: This is not the first time such accusations have been made. Both BBC News and Ars Technica mention that other major US AI developers, including OpenAI and Google, have reported similar attacks on their own models. US developers have previously claimed that Chinese competitors use these techniques to build rival technology at only a small fraction of the actual cost. Anthropic warned that there is now a growing "circumvention economy"—a system where people find ways to bypass rules—that helps these companies hide their activities using complex technical tricks.
paragraphs.zh: 這並非首次出現此類指控。英國廣播公司新聞網與 Ars Technica 皆提到，包括 OpenAI 與 Google 在內的其他美國大型人工智慧開發商，也曾通報其模型遭受類似攻擊。美國開發商先前即主張，中國競爭對手利用這些技術，僅以實際成本的一小部分便打造出對抗性的技術。Anthropic 警告，目前正出現一種日益擴大的「規避經濟」——即透過複雜的技術手段繞過規則並隱藏活動的體系。

paragraphs.en: The situation is complicated by broader tensions between the US and China regarding technology and national security. Anthropic pointed to claims from the US Department of Defense that suggest several major Chinese firms, including Alibaba, have ties to the Chinese military. While these companies have denied such claims, the tension remains high. In fact, Alibaba has recently taken legal action against the US government, asking to be removed from a list of companies that the US military considers a security risk.
paragraphs.zh: 美中兩國在科技與國家安全方面的廣泛緊張關係，使局勢更為複雜。Anthropic 引述美國國防部的說法，指出包括阿里巴巴在內的多家中國大型企業與中國軍方有關聯。儘管這些公司否認相關指控，但緊張局勢依然高漲。事實上，阿里巴巴近期已對美國政府採取法律行動，要求將其從美國軍方認定的安全風險企業名單中移除。

paragraphs.en: Anthropic is currently preparing for a major move into the public stock market, which could make it one of the most valuable companies in the world. As the company grows, it is urging the US Congress to create stricter rules to stop these attacks. Anthropic believes that without new measures, US technology will continue to be stolen, which could threaten both the economy and national security.
paragraphs.zh: Anthropic 目前正準備進軍公開股票市場，這可能使其成為全球最有價值的公司之一。隨著公司成長，它正敦促美國國會制定更嚴格的規則以遏止這些攻擊。Anthropic 認為，若無新措施，美國技術將持續遭到竊取，這可能威脅到經濟與國家安全。

paragraphs.en: For now, the situation remains a point of serious disagreement. While Anthropic has provided details about the millions of exchanges it recorded, Alibaba has not yet provided a public response to these specific claims. The case highlights how difficult it is to protect advanced software in a world where AI models are becoming more powerful and more valuable every day. As the race to build the best AI continues, these "distillation attacks" are likely to remain a major concern for tech companies and government officials alike.
paragraphs.zh: 目前，此情況仍是嚴重的爭議焦點。儘管 Anthropic 提供了其記錄的數百萬次交流細節，但阿里巴巴尚未針對這些具體指控做出公開回應。此案凸顯了在人工智慧模型日益強大且價值與日俱增的世界中，保護先進軟體是多麼困難。隨著打造最強人工智慧的競賽持續進行，這些「蒸餾攻擊」很可能仍是科技公司與政府官員共同關注的重大問題。

keyTerms.definitionEn: Connected to or associated with someone or something.
keyTerms.noteZh: 此處表示幕後操縱者與該公司有聯繫，而非實體連接。文中：According to BBC News, the company claims that operators linked to Alibaba used thousands of fraudulent accounts to interact with Claude nearly 29 million times.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The size, extent, or importance of something.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（秤、刻度），這裡指事件發生的廣度或嚴重程度。文中：Anthropic noted that the attackers targeted some of Claude’s most valuable features. These include the model's ability to solve complex software engineering problems and its skill in handling long-term tasks. The company argued that these attacks are happening on an "industrial scale."

keyTerms.definitionEn: An action taken to achieve a goal or a change in status.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（移動），這裡作名詞指公司的一項重大商業決策。文中：Anthropic is currently preparing for a major move into the public stock market, which could make it one of the most valuable companies in the world.

sources.name: BBC News
sources.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: Anthropic says Alibaba must be punished for largest Claude cloning attack

quiz.question: Over what specific period did the alleged 'distillation attack' on Claude take place?

options.C: From the time Claude was first released until early June
options.D: During the months of May and June

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。根據文章第二段，文中明確指出這些互動發生在 4 月 22 日至 6 月 5 日之間。選項 B 並未提及具體年份或全年數據；選項 C 錯誤地推測了攻擊起始時間；選項 D 雖然包含部分時間，但忽略了 4 月份的數據，因此 A 是最精確的答案。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the 'distillation attack' strategy?

options.A: It is a method used primarily to crash an AI system's server
options.B: It requires the attacker to have their own original AI research team
options.C: It allows companies to bypass the high costs of independent research
options.D: It is a legal way for companies to share data with competitors

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第二段，蒸餾攻擊（distillation attack）讓公司能透過強大的模型來訓練較弱的模型，進而複製先進技能，而不需投入高昂的研發經費。選項 A 錯誤，這並非為了癱瘓系統；選項 B 與文中提到的「節省研發成本」目標衝突；選項 D 錯誤，這明顯被 Anthropic 指控為盜竊行為，並非合法共享。

quiz.question: In the fourth paragraph, what does the term 'circumvention economy' refer to?

options.A: A system where companies trade AI models for profit
options.B: A network of methods used to bypass rules and hide activities
options.C: The financial loss caused by AI technology theft
options.D: The growth of the AI industry in the global market

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。文章第四段將其定義為「a system where people find ways to bypass rules」，即繞過規則並隱藏行為的系統。選項 A 誤解了該詞的負面意涵；選項 C 將其視為損失而非手段；選項 D 則過於籠統，未捕捉到「規避規則」這一核心意義。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article?

options.A: Alibaba has officially admitted to stealing technology from Anthropic
options.B: The US government has already banned all Chinese AI companies
options.C: AI developers are facing significant challenges in protecting their technology from large-scale theft
options.D: Anthropic is currently the only company affected by AI distillation attacks

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文的核心在於探討 Anthropic 對阿里巴巴的指控，並延伸至 AI 產業面臨的「蒸餾攻擊」威脅及保護先進軟體的困難。選項 A 錯誤，因為文中提到阿里巴巴尚未回應；選項 B 與文中事實不符；選項 D 錯誤，因為文中提到 OpenAI 和 Google 也曾遭遇類似攻擊。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
